### Proposed Amendment
A clear description of the change and its justification.

### Impact
- **Legal:** [e.g., aligns with new ILO standards]
- **Ethical:** [e.g., strengthens worker protections]
- **Technical:** [e.g., clarifies automation tax calculation]

### Additional Context
Link to relevant UN/ILO documents or case studies.
